# pexip_infinity_gms_access_token (Resource)

Manages a Google Meet Service (GMS) access token configuration with the Infinity service. These tokens are used for Google Meet integration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_gms_access_token" "example" {
  name = "Google Meet Service Token"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the GMS access token. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Optional

- `token` (String, Sensitive) The Google Meet access token. This field is sensitive and will not be displayed in logs.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the GMS access token
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the GMS access token
